response.bodyRaw: {"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Show the number of students in each department"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Show the number of students in each department"},"startedAt":1771855294322,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The question asks for the number of students in each department. I have confirmed that the students table has a department_id foreign key referencing the departments table. I need to group students by department and count them, joining with the departments table to show the department name. The query will use COUNT(*) grouped by department with a LEFT JOIN to include departments with no students.","sql":"SELECT d.name AS department_name, COUNT(s.id) AS student_count FROM departments d LEFT JOIN students s ON d.id = s.department_id GROUP BY d.id, d.name ORDER BY d.name","assumptions":["Assuming all students have a valid department_id (no NULL values in the foreign key)","Assuming we
